selected.reason: Shows a clear slide categorizing AI applications (大语言模型, AI绘图) with visual icons and text, serving as a primary teaching artifact for course structure.
Displays a detailed software interface (GitHub repository for So-vits-svc) with project files and technical details, providing source-backed evidence for AI voice cloning tools.
Captures a full UI of a Voice Changer application with interactive elements (mic, waveform, live mode), demonstrating a practical demo of AI voice technology.
